# Omar Al-Bakri

> Omar Al-Bakri builds AI systems for financial services. Previously 15 years in enterprise FinTech sales across Tier 1 banks and payments infrastructure.

## Positioning

Omar learned Python and TypeScript in his forties after fifteen years selling financial technology. He now builds agent systems and full-stack AI products, carrying the same problem from commercial case to architecture, implementation and evaluation.

Bangkok-based · open to remote roles, consulting and contracting globally

## Selected work

- [CallScore](https://call-score.com): extracts public creator market calls, matches them to timestamped price outcomes and scores evidence-backed performance. Live product.
- [ruleIQ](https://github.com/OmarA1-Bakri-Org/ruleIQ): connects regulatory obligations to controls, evidence, retrieval and review. Production-ready repository.
- Helios: coordinates B2B prospecting, enrichment and outreach through a desktop operator surface, MCP services and graph memory. Private build.
- [thredOS](https://github.com/OmarA1-Bakri-Org/thredOS): local-first control plane for structured multi-agent workflows, policy, approvals and provenance. Pre-launch.

## Work together

- Remote roles with end-to-end ownership of an applied AI product or workstream.
- Consulting and contracting for defined AI products, agent workflows and production integrations.
